zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Philip Darcy於1223年之後出生在英國林可爾史爾諾可頓時，他的父親Norman Darcy Lord of Nocton8808歲，母親Agnes8806歲。他於1260年之前與Isabella Bertram在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1264年5月在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾諾可頓。

nameMeanings.name: Darcy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Brendan, Eamonn, Maeve, Malachy, Niamh, Seamus.  French Gisele, Julien, Normand, Alain, Armand, Cecile, Clemence, Dominique, Emile, Gilles, Jean-Paul, Laure.
English (Lancashire) and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Arcy in Manche, France, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’.

Irish: in Ireland, this is generally the Norman name (see 1 above), established in Meath by Sir William D'Arcy in the 1360s, but it was also adopted for Ó Dorchaidhe ‘descendant of the dark one’, from dorcha ‘dark, gloomy’, a Connacht name that fell together with the Norman surname, which was introduced by Sir William D'Arcy and Sir John D'Arcy, Chief Justiciar of Ireland in the 14th century.

variants.name: Darcey
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and Irish (Tipperary): variant of   Darcy  .

nameMeanings.name: Philip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Philip Darcy was born after 1223, in Nocton, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Norman Darcy Lord of Nocton, was 8808 and his mother, Agnes, was 8806. He married Isabella Bertram before 1260, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in May 1264, in Nocton, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

Il a épousé Isabella Bertram avant 1260, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en mai 1264, à Nocton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat vor 1260 in England Isabella Bertram geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb im Mai 1264 in Nocton, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

Lui sposato Isabella Bertram prima del 1260, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel maggio 1264, nel Nocton, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Philip Darcyが1223年以後にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアノクトンで生まれた時，父Norman Darcy Lord of Noctonは8808歳，母Agnesは8806歳であった。1260年以前にイギリスでIsabella Bertramと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1264年5月にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアノクトンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Philip Darcy(이)가 1223년 이후 영국 링코실르 노크턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Norman Darcy Lord of Nocton(은)는 8808세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes(은)는 8806세였다. 그는 1260년 이전 영국에서 Isabella Bertram(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1264년 5월 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 노크턴에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Philip Darcy родился после 1223 г. в местности ноктон, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Norman Darcy Lord of Nocton было 8808 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes, 8806. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella Bertram перед 1260 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер май 1264 г. в местности ноктон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.
